**Focus:** Social Media Content Library - Post tracking and review workflows

---

## Objective
**Goal:** Build comprehensive social media content library and workflows to store, track, and review pending and previously submitted posts

**Success Criteria:**
- [ ] Schema defined for social post tracking (draft, pending, submitted, archived states)
- [ ] Storage system implemented (extends or complements existing content_library.py)
- [ ] Folder structure for organizing posts by status and platform
- [ ] Review workflow commands created (approve, revise, publish, archive)
- [ ] Integration with existing LinkedIn post generation system
- [ ] Documentation for workflow usage
- [ ] Testing with sample posts from parent thread
